title: zanthoxylum formiciferum
intro: Zanthoxylum formiciferum, also known as the Formiciferum tree or the Formosan prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Taiwan and China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum formiciferum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the management of various gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
